pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva08 (Gloss Ver.) 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Evangelion Eva08 (Gloss Ver.) 400% Collectible Figure!  This figure stands at approximately 11.02' tall and features a new paint version of the artificial human, Eva-08 from the hit series Evangelion.  Be sure to add this collectible figure set to your collection today!
